---
name: apex-utility-classes
description: Returns Oracle APEX utility CSS classes for styling and layout
---

When asked about APEX utility classes or when styling APEX components, return the relevant CSS classes from the data below.

## Usage

Apply these classes directly to HTML elements. For example:

```html
<div class="u-padding-md">
  <span class="u-text-bold u-success-text">Success!</span>
</div>

## Available Utility Classes

```
items[193]{name,description,category}:
  col-xxs-[1-12],CSS class prefix for extra extra small screens (479px and below),Grid Layout / Responsive
  col-xs-[1-12],CSS class prefix for extra small screens (480px to 639px),Grid Layout / Responsive
  col-sm-[1-12],CSS class prefix for small screens (640px to 767px),Grid Layout / Responsive
  col-md-[1-12],CSS class prefix for medium screens (768px to 991px),Grid Layout / Responsive
  col-lg-[1-12],CSS class prefix for large screens (992px to 1199px),Grid Layout / Responsive
  col-xl-[1-12],CSS class prefix for extra large screens (1200px to 1399px),Grid Layout / Responsive
  col-xxl-[1-12],CSS class prefix for extra extra large screens (1400px and above),Grid Layout / Responsive
  hidden-xxs-up,Hide element on extra extra small screens (479px and below) and above (26.1+),Grid Layout / Responsive
  hidden-xxs-down,Hide element on extra extra small screens (479px and below) and below (26.1+),Grid Layout / Responsive
  hidden-xs-up,Hide element on extra small screens (480-639px) and above (26.1+),Grid Layout / Responsive
  hidden-xs-down,Hide element on extra small screens (480-639px) and below (26.1+),Grid Layout / Responsive
  hidden-sm-up,Hide element on small screens (640-767px) and above (26.1+),Grid Layout / Responsive
  hidden-sm-down,Hide element on small screens (640-767px) and below (26.1+),Grid Layout / Responsive
  hidden-md-up,Hide element on medium screens (768-991px) and above (26.1+),Grid Layout / Responsive
  hidden-md-down,Hide element on medium screens (768-991px) and below (26.1+),Grid Layout / Responsive
  hidden-lg-up,Hide element on large screens (992px+) and above (26.1+),Grid Layout / Responsive
  hidden-lg-down,Hide element on large screens (992px+) and below (26.1+),Grid Layout / Responsive

```

## Categories

### Grid Layout / Responsive

- **Column classes** (`col-{size}-[1-12]`): 12-column grid for different breakpoints
- **Visibility** (`hidden-{size}-up/down`): Show/hide content at breakpoints (26.1+ — 10 classes: `hidden-xxs-up/down` through `hidden-lg-up/down`)

**Breakpoints:**
| Size | Range |
|------|-------|
| xxs | 479px and below |
| xs | 480px - 639px |
| sm | 640px - 767px |
| md | 768px - 991px |
| lg | 992px - 1199px |
| xl | 1200px - 1399px |
| xxl | 1400px and above |

### Color and Status Modifiers

- **Palette colors** (`u-color-[1-45]`): Numbered colors with `-text`, `-bg`, `-border` variants
- **Semantic states**: `u-normal`, `u-hot`, `u-warning`, `u-danger`, `u-info`, `u-success`
- **Opacity** (`u-opacity-[10-100]`): Opacity in 10% increments
- **Shadows** (`u-shadow-{none|sm|md|lg}`): Box shadow utilities

### Layout Modifiers

- **Spacing (26.1+)**: `u-margin-{none|xs|sm|md|lg|xl}`, `u-padding-{none|xs|sm|md|lg|xl}`, `u-margin-inline-auto` — all support directional suffix (`-top-`, `-right-`, `-bottom-`, `-left-`)
- **Spacing (legacy)**: `margin-{none|sm|md|lg}`, `padding-{none|sm|md|lg}` — still work as aliases
- **Sizing**: `w[10-800]`, `h[10-800]`, `w[5-100]p` (percentage)
- **Float/Align (26.1+)**: `u-pullLeft`, `u-pullRight`, `u-alignTop`, `u-alignMiddle`, `u-alignBaseline`, `u-alignBottom`
- **Flexbox (26.1+)**: `u-flex` (container), `u-flex-item`, `u-flex-grow-1`, `u-flex-shrink-1`, `u-flex-basis-auto`
- **Flex alignment (26.1+)**: `u-justify-content-*`, `u-align-items-*`, `u-align-self-*`, `u-align-content-*`
- **Order (26.1+)**: `u-order-[0-5]`, `u-order-{size}-[0-5]` (responsive)
- **Gap (26.1+)**: `u-gap-[0|1|2|3|4|5|6|8]` — values map to 0/4/8/12/16/20/24/32px
- **Overflow (26.1+)**: `u-overflow-{auto|hidden|scroll|x-scroll|y-scroll|visible|clip}`

### Content Modifiers

- **Text alignment**: `u-textStart`, `u-textCenter`, `u-textEnd`
- **Text transform**: `u-textUpper` / `u-text-uppercase` (26.1+), `u-textLower` / `u-text-lowercase` (26.1+), `u-textInitCap`
- **Typography**: Headings (`u-text-heading-*`), subheadings (`u-text-subheading-*`), body sizes (`u-text-body-*` — now includes `xs` and `2xs` in 26.1+)
- **Font weights (26.1+ adds `u-text-light`)**: ultralight → light → normal → semibold → bold → heavy
- **Monospace**: `u-text-mono` / `u-fixedFont` (alias, 26.1+)
- **Numeric**: `u-tabular-nums` — equal-width digits for aligned columns (26.1+)
- **Truncation**: `u-lineclamp-[1-5]`, `u-truncate`, `u-nowrap`
- **Visibility**: `u-hidden`, `u-visible`, `u-VisuallyHidden`
- **Text colors**: `u-text-default-color`, `u-text-title-color`, `u-text-subtitle-color`, `u-text-muted-color`
